soil_guidelines.clay: Clay soils retain water. Avoid overwatering to prevent root rot in wet conditions.
soil_guidelines.sandy: Sandy soils drain quickly. Apply organic mulches and water more frequently.
soil_guidelines.loamy: Loamy soil has ideal drainage and nutrient retention. Maintain regular watering cycles.

stage_guidelines.vegetative: Support active vegetative growth with nitrogen-based organic fertilizers.
stage_guidelines.flowering: Divert nutrition to potassium and phosphorus. Avoid overhead watering during bloom to prevent flower drop.
stage_guidelines.fruiting: Maintain consistent moisture to prevent fruit split and rot.
stage_guidelines.mature: Reduce irrigation and prepare for harvest. Monitor for post-harvest decay vectors.
